title: Tempad Canceller
description: allows Tempad2 to be blacklisted per Dim/Biome
body: Creates a config which can be edited to disable the use of Tempad2 (fabric 1.20.1) per biome or per dimension.  With this installed the Tempad will emit a shield sound and message the player feedback stating it'll not function.   This works with both right-click and keybind methods
